chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-590 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s)  For orders as to non-prosecution 05.03.2026 Qazi Ahmed Kamal, Advocate for the petitioner alongwith Mr. Anees Tariq, Advocate M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith SIP Noor Ahmed, P.S Manghopir, West Karachi ---------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that missing person namely Rashid Iqbal S/o Abdul Qayyum (Late) has been surfaced, as he is booked in Crime No.61 under Section 353, 324, 34 PPC and Crime No.63 of 2026 under Section 23(A) of Sindh Arms Act, 2013; both registered with P.S S.I.U, Saddar, Karachi, therefore, this petition has become infructuous. Hence, under instructions he does not press the same, which is not opposed by the learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed having become infructuous. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
